profile.name: supertonic

intro.title: Supertonic — Lightning Fast, On-Device, Accurate TTS
intro.desc: Supertonic** is a lightning-fast, on-device multilingual text-to-speech system designed for local inference with minimal overhead. Powered by ONNX Runtime, it runs entirely on your device—no cloud, no API calls, no privacy concerns.

profile.one: Supertonic — Lightning Fast, On-Device, Accurate TTS
